The '''''Predator''-class warship''' was a V-shaped [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kassihm]] used one of these, the ''[[M'hendosat]]'', in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This class may be the same as the [[Predator-class gunship|''Predator''-class gunship]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]''
